title: SSE frame extraction: split_off reallocates on every frame
description: subscribe_events (client.rs:193) uses buf.split_off(pos+delim_len) to discard consumed bytes, then assigns the suffix back to buf. String::split_off allocates a new String for the suffix on every frame extraction; the old allocation is dropped. For a high-throughput SSE stream (typing/presence events) this is one allocation per frame. A ring-buffer or drain-and-shift approach using a byte cursor would eliminate this per-frame allocation.
